'''Binring Biomedical Product''' was a medical research company.

==History==
Based in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Lurark]] on [[Saffalore]], Binring was originally an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] supplier. They produced field [[Ration pack/Legends|rations]] and other [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] for the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], and engineered animals to adapt to planetary environments. Binring also conducted secret research for the Empire. At the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the company also monitored many incubator units that were used to bio-engineer creatures. When a rare mutation occurred, the company was immediately informed.<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> The company was taken over by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] some time after he began assembling his financial empire, with the help of Doctor [[Tuzin Gast]]. One of Zsinj's special projects, [[Project Chubar]], took place at Binring. Then in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Zsinj had the special project laboratory moved to his flagship, [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. [[Wraith Squadron]] then attacked the facility, and captured [[Edda Gast]], who took over the lab after her uncle's suicide.
